---
title: "Per le scuole - Laboratori e spettacoli"
listing:
  contents: corsi
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

{{< video https://youtube.com/watch?v=RUttCQcHmGY&feature=shared >}}

[CV di Monserrat Olavarria Belmaceda](/corsi/Curriculum_didattico_Olavarria.pdf)
